§7Guide Book #17§r
§lBadlands Scorpion§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Medium arthropod, Monster.
•§lSpawn in§r: Badlands
•§rHealth§r: 16
•§lWalk speed: 0.3§r

•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lPossible drops§r: Scorpion Telson, Raw Arthropod Meat, Spider Eye, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2
•§lMelee effect§r: Mining Fatigue §o(1:00)§r

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Badlands Scorpions stalk the cliffs and canyons with unmatched tenacity. Their venom doesn’t just harm — it saps the strength of their victims, leaving them sluggish and vulnerable. With the ability to climb and ambush from
heights, these silent predators are a dangerous surprise in the arid wastelands.§’
